name: Red Riding Werewolf
description:
Sweet girl at day, Werewolf at night...

Rosie isn’t like most normal girls. She has the ears and tail of a wolf. But otherwise looks like an unassuming woman. Until at night, where she gets the claws and paws of a wolf and she loses control of herself in various degrees. Sometimes she starts walking on all fours, start hunting and eating small animals (specifically rabbits). Other times, she attacks anything in her path (including humans). She likes to show off her ears and tail. She doesn’t care if someone knows about her transformation during night but won’t directly tell it to someone.
creator: Yomamasofat
